title: Implement pawn attack masks and movement helpers
description: Create the pawn-specific attack and movement primitives needed for generation.
acceptance: White and black pawn attack masks are correct
Edge-file behavior is covered by tests

title: Implement knight and king attack generation
description: Add precomputed or computed attack masks for knight and king moves.
acceptance: Knight attacks are correct from center, edge, and corner squares
King attacks are correct from center, edge, and corner squares

title: Implement bishop, rook, and queen sliding attacks
description: Generate sliding attacks with occupancy-aware ray traversal or a later-optimizable approach.
acceptance: Sliding attacks stop at blockers correctly
Tests cover blockers, captures, and empty rays

title: Implement pseudo-legal move generation for all piece types
description: Generate pseudo-legal quiet and capture moves for every piece, including promotions and double pushes.
acceptance: Move lists are generated for all piece types
Captures and quiet moves are both included
Promotion moves are generated correctly

title: Implement king-in-check detection
description: Detect whether a side's king is attacked in the current position.
acceptance: Check detection works for all piece types
Unit tests cover direct checks and discovered checks

title: Implement castling and en passant generation rules
description: Add pseudo-legal generation for castling and en passant before final legality filtering.
acceptance: Castling rights are honored
Blocked or attacked castling paths are excluded when legality is checked
En passant candidates are generated only when the ep square is present

title: Implement pin handling and legal move filtering
description: Restrict pseudo-legal moves down to fully legal moves, including pinned pieces and evasions while in check.
acceptance: Pinned pieces cannot expose the king illegally
Check evasions are limited to legal responses
Legal move lists contain no king-exposing moves

title: Add perft runner and baseline perft fixtures
description: Create a perft tool or test harness for validating move generation.
acceptance: Perft can run on an arbitrary FEN and depth
Fixture-based perft tests exist

title: Pass start position and Kiwipete perft gates
description: Use the perft harness to prove foundational move legality on standard regression positions.
acceptance: Starting position perft matches expected counts for target depths
Kiwipete perft matches expected counts for target depths

title: Pass targeted perft positions for special rules
description: Validate tricky positions covering castling, promotions, checks, pins, and en passant.
acceptance: Targeted fixtures for special rules are present
Each targeted perft fixture passes
